title: NxPigDropOPItems
description: Minecraft but Pigs give op items, kill pigs and get op items
body:
NxPigDropOPItems is a Paper / Spigot 1.21+ plugin that replaces pig drops with powerful, rotating OP loot tables.

🐷 Pig Drop System:
• Each pig kill cycles between multiple loot files
• Prevents farming abuse
• Every kill feels unique

🔥 Features:
• Netherite OP tools & armor
• Custom enchanted weapons
• OP potions (Haste, Strength, Regeneration, etc.)
• High-value blocks & resources

⚙️ Technical:
• No dependencies
• Lightweight & optimized
• Fully server-side
• Easy plug & play

📌 Supported Versions:
• Paper / Spigot 1.21+

Just drop the plugin into your plugins folder and restart.
